report.name: PENPRN_DEC_INSTANCE_ETEAM_DEATH

dataSource.name: Q_1
dataSource.select: SELECT COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_DOMAIN_TYPE, COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_NAME, PEN_PRODUCTS.PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION.PENSION_IKA_INST_NAME, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PROTOCOL_NO, REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID, REG_INSURED.SEX, REG_INSURED.SURNAME, REG_INSURED.NAME, REG_INSURED.FATHER_NAME, REG_INSURED.MOTHER_NAME, DECODE(REG_INSURED.SEX,'Α','του ασφαλισμένου ','θ','της ασφαλισμένης '), REG_INSURED.DATE_OF_BIRTH FROM REG_INSURED, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES, COM_ORG_BRANCHES, PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST, PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS, PEN_PRODUCTS, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION WHERE PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE=:P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_DOCUMENT_TYPE_APPL_CODE='00001' AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR=:P_APPL_YEAR AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID_IND AND REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID=PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.INSURED_ID AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.QC_PER_PRODINST_CODE=:P_QC_PER_PRODINST AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE AND COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION.PENSION_IKA_INST_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.INSTITUTION_CODE AND PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_CODE AND COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE;

dataItem.name: DECODE_REG_INSURED_SEX_Α_του_α
dataItem.defaultLabel: Decode Reg Insured Sex Α Του Α

dataSource.name: Q_2
dataSource.select:
SELECT b.FULLNAME FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE a, CON_EMPLOYERS b
WHERE
a.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND a.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND a.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND a.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR = '1' AND a.INS_INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND
a.TITLE_CODE = '00074' AND a.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE = '00045' AND
a.VALUE = b.EMPLOYER_ID;

dataSource.name: Q_3
dataSource.select:
SELECT NVL(TO_NUMBER(a.VALUE),0) value_4 FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE a WHERE
a.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND a.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND a.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND a.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR = '1' AND a.INS_INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND
a.TITLE_CODE = '00075' AND a.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE = '00048'

dataSource.name: Q_4
dataSource.select:
SELECT NVL(TO_NUMBER(a.VALUE),0) value_1 FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE a WHERE
a.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND a.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND a.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND a.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR = '1' AND a.INS_INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND
a.TITLE_CODE = '00075' AND a.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE = '00070'

dataSource.name: Q_5
dataSource.select:
SELECT NVL(TO_NUMBER(a.VALUE),0) value_4 FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE a WHERE
a.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND a.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND a.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND a.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR = '1' AND a.INS_INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND
a.TITLE_CODE = '00075' AND a.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE = '00122'

dataSource.name: Q_6
dataSource.select:
SELECT b.EXIT_CAUSE_DESCR FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE a, PEN_NPDD_EXIT_CAUSE b
WHERE
a.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND a.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND a.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND a.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR = '1' AND a.INS_INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND
a.TITLE_CODE = '00074' AND a.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE = '00064' AND
a.VALUE = b.EXIT_CAUSE_CODE;

dataSource.name: Q_7
Q_8

dataItem.name: TO_DATE_a_VALUE_DD_MM_RRRR
dataItem.defaultLabel: To Date A Value Dd Mm Rrrr

dataSource.name: Q_9

dataItem.name: TO_DATE_a_VALUE_DD_MM_RRRR1
dataItem.defaultLabel: To Date A Value Dd Mm Rrrr1

dataSource.name: Q_10
dataSource.select: SELECT ' ' AMOUNT_DESCR, 1 AMOUNT, ' ' SUM_INDICATOR, ' ' CALCULATION_FLG FROM DUAL;

dataSource.name: Q_11
dataSource.select:
SELECT PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE WHERE
PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND
PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR= :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR= '1'
AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='0' ORDER BY PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_12
dataSource.select:
SELECT PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE WHERE
PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND
PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR= :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR= '1'
AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='1' ORDER BY PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_13
dataSource.select: SELECT FROM_WORKING_DATE, TO_WORKING_DATE, INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL, MONTH, YEAR FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS WHERE PEN_INSURED_DAYS.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO= :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID= :P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.USE_FLG='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CATEGORY='1' ORDER BY YEAR,MONTH,INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE;

dataSource.name: Q_14
dataSource.select: SELECT FROM_WORKING_DATE, TO_WORKING_DATE, INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL, MONTH, YEAR, INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS WHERE PEN_INSURED_DAYS.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO= :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID= :P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.USE_FLG='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CATEGORY='2' ORDER BY YEAR,MONTH,INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE;

dataSource.name: Q_16
dataSource.select:
SELECT b.EXIT_CAUSE_DESCR
FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE a, PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE c, PEN_NPDD_EXIT_CAUSE b
WHERE
c.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO = :VALUE AND c.DT_DECISION_YEAR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND c.DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE = :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND c.DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE = '1' AND
a.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = c.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR AND a.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = DECISION_YEAR_SR AND a.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND a.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR = DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR AND a.INS_INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND
a.TITLE_CODE = '00074' AND a.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE = '00064' AND
a.VALUE = b.EXIT_CAUSE_CODE;

dataSource.name: Q_17
dataSource.select:
SELECT
b.DATE_OF_BIRTH, b.NAME
FROM PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE_DEATH a, REG_INSURED b
WHERE
a.GROUP_ID = :P_GROUP_ID AND
a.DEPENDENCY_TYPE = '00003' AND a.INSURED_ID = b.INSURED_ID

dataSource.name: Q_19
dataSource.select:
SELECT a.SURNAME, a.NAME, a.FATHER_NAME, a.MOTHER_NAME, a.INSURED_ID, a.DATE_OF_BIRTH, a.DATE_OF_DEATH FROM REG_INSURED a
WHERE
a.INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID

dataSource.name: Q_18
dataSource.select:
SELECT
DECODE(a.DEPENDENCY_TYPE,'00002','ΧΗΡΑ:','00003','ΠΑΙΔΙ:','00005','ΜΗΤΕΡΑ:','00004','ΠΑΤΕΡΑΣ:') DEPENDENCY_TYPE_DESCR, b.SURNAME || ' ' || b.NAME FULLNAME
FROM PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE_DEATH a, REG_INSURED b, PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE c
WHERE
a.GROUP_ID = :P_GROUP_ID AND
(a.DEPENDENCY_TYPE = '00002' OR a.DEPENDENCY_TYPE = '00005' OR a.DEPENDENCY_TYPE = '00004') AND
a.DT_DECISION_YEAR = c.DT_DECISION_YEAR AND a.DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE = c.DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND a.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO = c.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO AND a.DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE = c.DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE AND c.DECISION_STATE_FLG = '1' AND
a.INSURED_ID = b.INSURED_ID

textSegment.string: που προέκυψε από τον θανόντα με τα κάτωθι στοιχεία
2. Έχοντας υπόψη τα στοιχεία του φακέλου από τα οποία προκύπτουν τα εξής:
Γ' ΑΙΤΙΑ ΕΞΟΔΟΥ ΑΠΟ ΤΗΝ ΥΠΗΡΕΣΙΑ
Ε' ΗΜΕΡΟΜΗΝΙΑ ΚΟΙΝΟΠΟΙΗΣΗΣ ΑΠΟΦΑΣΗΣ ΚΥΡΙΑΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ

function.name: cf_1formula
cf_sexformula
cf_2formula

f_10formattrigger
f_12formattrigger
b_39formattrigger
cf_3formula
cf_4formula
cf_5formula
cf_6formula

report.webSource:
<%@ taglib uri="/WEB-INF/lib/reports_tld.jar" prefix="rw" %> <%@ page language="java" import="java.io.*" errorPage="/rwerror.jsp" session="false" %> <%@ page contentType="text/html;charset=ISO-8859-1" %> <!-- <rw:report id="report"> <rw:objects id="objects"> </rw:objects> -->
